author: Niche Gamer
text:
Meowmories is a horror game from a cat’s perspective Meowmories is a cat-based horror, where you play as a cat and must brave a horrifying world in search of your owner. A demo is scheduled to release soon.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Team17 confirms new layoffs following internal restructuring The publisher behind games such as Worms, Overcooked, Dredge, and Hell Let Loose, Team17, has confirmed layoffs affecting its marketing and communications operations. According to reports, the company recently completed a review of its business structure and decided to make changes within the department. Team17 later confirmed two staff members were let go. The latest cuts […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game gets slight delay Publisher PM Studios and developer Gameplay Group announced a slight delay for Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game. Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game will forgo its previously planned July 2nd release for one later that month, on July 23rd. When the fighting game does launch, it’ll be on Windows PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2, and […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales Preview The Adventures of Elliot: the Millennium Tales releases in mid June. But in the meantime, the Prologue Demo provides a rich appetizer.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons: Battlemarked coming to Switch 2 Resolution Games has announced Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons: Battlemarked is coming to Switch 2. The digital take on the fantasy tabletop game is coming to Switch 2 (via the eShop) on June 16th. Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons: Battlemarked has been available across SteamVR, PlayStation VR2, and Meta Quest. Here’s a rundown on the game: Fantasy tabletop adventure set […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
The Guild: Europa 1410 reveals early access release date Ashborne Games and THQ Nordic have announced that The Guild: Europa 1410 will enter Early Access on Steam on July 16, bringing the beloved strategy and life simulation series back with a modern overhaul powered by Unreal Engine 5. Much like the original Europa 1400 – The Guild, you begin as the head of a […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Waifu Wednesday: Miss Pauling from Team Fortress 2 Welcome back to Waifu Wednesday, Niche Gamer’s column where we talk about characters, their appeal, and a little on their history. It’s Waifu Wednesday! This week’s waifu is Miss Pauling from Team Fortress 2. Team Fortress 2 used to be a pretty lore-sparse game, but throughout the 2010s that changed quickly as Valve began releasing comics […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Warhammer legend John Blanche has passed away at 78 The Warhammer community is mourning the loss of John Blanche, the legendary artist and art director whose work helped define the look and identity of the franchise for decades. Blanche passed away in 2026 at the age of 78. For many fans, Warhammer simply wouldn’t look the way it does today without him. His dark, […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
System Shock 2: 25th Anniversary Remaster now available for Switch 2 Nightdive Studios has released a native Switch 2 port for their System Shock 2: 25th Anniversary Remaster. System Shock 2: 25th Anniversary Remaster is now available for Switch 2, via the eShop. Owners of the Switch 1 version can upgrade for free. The remaster has been available for Windows PC (Steam, GOG, Epic Games Store, Humble Store), Xbox […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight gets Switch 2 release date Warner Bros. Games and TT Games have confirmed that LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight will arrive on Nintendo Switch 2 on September 18, several months after launching on other platforms. The game originally released in May for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), where it earned positive reviews for blending classic […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Rumored Nintendo Direct could happen next week The recently rumored summer 2026 Nintendo Direct may be closer than many fans expected. According to industry insiders Jeff Grubb and NateTheHate, Nintendo is reportedly planning a new presentation around June 9, although the company has yet to make anything official. What has fans particularly excited is the claim that this won’t be a Partner […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Pokemon Champions mobile version launches this month Publisher The Pokemon Company and developer The Pokemon Works announced release date for Pokemon Champions on smartphones. Their new multiplayer-focused Pokemon battling game is coming to iOS and Android later this month, on June 17th. Pokemon Champions first launched for Nintendo Switch on April 8th. The free-to-play game will support cross-platform play between Switch, Switch 2, and […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Xbox Game Pass lineup for early June 2026 announced Microsoft has announced the next lineup of games coming to Xbox Game Pass, free games for subscribers of the platform for early June 2026. Here’s a rundown on the new Xbox Game Pass lineup: Coming Soon to Xbox Game Pass Herdling (Cloud, XBOX Series X|S, and PC) – June 4 Now with Game Pass Premium; joining Game Pass Ultimate […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Low-poly and fast-paced shooter Delta gets demo Speed your way through the world of Delta, a low-poly, physics-based shooter where pace and precision are key.

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Prologue: Go Wayback development halted amid layoffs PlayerUnknown Productions, the studio founded by PUBG creator Brendan Greene, has announced layoffs amidst a company restructuring. Alongside news of the layoffs is the confirmation that development on Prologue: Go Wayback has come to an end. The survival game launched into Early Access on Steam in late 2025 and served as the first major showcase […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Howl’s Moving Castle-inspired game REKA hits full release in August REKA is a game that allows its players to live in a vast, magical open world as a witch. Cast spells, forage for ingredients, and build your own version of Howl's Moving Castle.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
2XKO adds new fighter Senna this month Riot Games has announced another new fighter for 2XKO, their League of Legends-themed fighting game. The free-to-play fighting game will add Senna the redeemer next week, on June 9th for all platforms. Here’s a new trailer for Senna: 2XKO has been available for PC (through its native client), Xbox Series X|S, and PlayStation 5.
